# Contributing

This is a personal blog — there are no content contributions to make. That said, improvements to the theme or tooling are welcome.

## Bug reports

If you find a bug in the theme (layout, build, Astro components), feel free to [open an issue](https://github.com/visbran/brandonvisca.com/issues/new).

Please check existing issues first to avoid duplicates.

## Pull requests

Small fixes (typos in code, broken links, CSS regressions) can be submitted directly as a PR.  
For larger changes, open an issue first to discuss the approach.

## Upstream

This project is a fork of [astro-devosfera](https://github.com/0xdres/astro-devosfera). If your change is relevant to the upstream theme, consider contributing there instead.
